# SKILL.md

## Skill: github-interaction

Reusable skill for interacting with GitHub programmatically. This skill covers:
- Creating and updating issues
- Commenting on issues and PRs
- Managing labels and assignees
- Creating, updating, and merging pull requests
- Triggering GitHub Actions workflows
- Fetching repository metadata

### Usage
- Use this skill in bots, CI/CD, or scripts to automate GitHub workflows.
- Combine with delivery-loop for end-to-end automation.

---

## Example
- Create issue: open a new issue with a template
- Comment: post status updates to PRs
- Label: auto-label PRs based on content
- Merge: auto-merge PRs after approval
- Trigger: dispatch workflow runs
